metadata.description: Base name for all resources. Drives every resource name in the deployment.
Container image tag for the backend, frontend, and ProCursor images.
Set to false if you want to provision infrastructure without creating the app resources.
Optional PostgreSQL connection string override input stored in Key Vault. Leave empty to derive the effective runtime connection string for the internal database app.
Optional ProCursor operational PostgreSQL connection string override input stored in Key Vault. Leave empty to reuse the effective backend runtime database connection.
JWT signing secret for backend auth. Must be at least 32 characters.
Bootstrap admin username seeded on first startup when no admin exists.
Bootstrap admin password seeded on first startup when no admin exists.
Shared symmetric key used for ProPR <-> ProCursor X-ProCursor-Key authentication.
PostgreSQL username stored in Key Vault.
PostgreSQL password stored in Key Vault.

variables.reverseProxyStartCommand:
[replace('set -eu
cat >/tmp/default.conf.template <<''EOF''
@@TEMPLATE@@
EOF
envsubst ''$FRONTEND_HOST $BACKEND_HOST'' </tmp/default.conf.template >/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
exec /docker-entrypoint.sh nginx -g ''daemon off;''
', '@@TEMPLATE@@', variables('nginxTemplate'))]

reverseProxyUrl.value: [if(not(equals(tryGet(if(parameters('deployApps'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'containerApps'), '2025-04-01'), null()), 'outputs', 'reverseProxyFqdn', 'value'), null())), format('https://{0}', tryGet(if(parameters('deployApps'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'containerApps'), '2025-04-01'), null()), 'outputs', 'reverseProxyFqdn', 'value')), 'not deployed')]
